# Support

Use GitHub issues for the free `ShipKit Public Demo Readiness` checklist and
inspector.

Please include:

- Godot version
- operating system
- whether this is a fresh or existing project
- what you copied into `res://addons/`
- any console output

For fit feedback, use the `Demo-readiness fit feedback` issue template. Useful
feedback includes what kind of public demo you are preparing, which wrapper or
trust checks matter most, and whether the optional full demo shell would save
meaningful setup time.

The optional full shell is available here:

https://shipkitstudio.itch.io/godot-4-next-fest-demo-shell

The full shell is free to inspect. Paid/supporter downloads are optional.
